title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS - 211info
text: INUKAI CLUB BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 560 SE 3rd Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Fall Hours: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-7pm Summer Hours: Varies by service (503) 640-4558 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 640-4558 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Program fees vary; scholarships and financial assistance are available DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEALS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS MATERIAL GOODS - COMMUNITY CLOSET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
